nonBlockingIssues.description: P2P flow does not discuss whether PO confirmation, GRN creation, or purchase invoice capture emit domain events. Event/listener boundary gap per VAL-FLOW-007.
Accounting flow does not discuss event/listener boundaries. Whether module-to-accounting communication uses events (outbox per ADR-003) is not addressed.
HR flow does not discuss event/listener boundaries. Payroll posting seam via AccountingFacade described as direct call but synchronous vs asynchronous not stated.
Relationship between DispatchController and SalesDispatchReconciliationService could be made more explicit in the dispatch lifecycle.
Naming inconsistency between SalesFulfillmentService and SalesDispatchReconciliationService should be clarified across canonical paths and lifecycle sections.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: flow packets should cross-link to directly relevant ADRs when they exist. ADR-003 (outbox pattern) is relevant to accounting/period-close and P2P flows; ADR-006 (portal/host boundaries) is relevant to invoice-dealer-finance flows. Currently no flow packets link to any ADR despite 6 ADRs existing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: grep for 'ADR' across docs/flows/ returns zero matches. docs/adrs/ contains 6 accepted ADRs. Review of docs-flows-commercial-finance flagged this as a VAL-FLOW-006 gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add procedural step: when writing flow packets, explicitly check whether any existing ADR is relevant and cross-link it in a Related Documentation section. Also add step: explicitly state whether cross-module communication is synchronous (direct call) or asynchronous (event/outbox) to close the event/listener boundary gap.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: 5 of 6 commercial/finance flow packets (P2P, accounting, HR, invoice, reporting) do not discuss event/listener boundaries. O2C correctly documents the single-event gap. This is a recurring pattern suggesting the skill should call it out explicitly.

rejectedObservations.observation: No flow packets cross-link to frontend handoff docs (VAL-FLOW-006).
rejectedObservations.reason: expected-absent — no frontend handoff docs exist yet at this milestone stage. Will be addressed in docs-handoff-* milestones.
